MOBTOKENS.HudCreatePartyGroupFromSelecti: Create Party Proxy From Selected Tokens
MOBTOKENS.DialogReplaceSelectedTokens: Replace selected tokens with the new group token
MOBTOKENS.DialogSplitCountsHint: Enter comma-separated values that total {total}. Example: 4, 3
MOBTOKENS.DialogSplitIndividualsHint: Creates one actor per surviving creature (for example, 6 becomes 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1).
MOBTOKENS.DialogCreateCountsHint: For one group, keep a single value. For multiple groups, enter comma-separated counts totaling {total}. Example: 10, 10, 3
MOBTOKENS.MoraleChatMessage: {actorName} makes a morale check: {rollTotal} vs {moraleTarget}. The group {outcome}.
MOBTOKENS.MoraleNotificationRouting: {actorName} fails morale and starts to run!
MOBTOKENS.HelpPromptBody: Mob Tokens is enabled. Right-clicking an actor in the directory lets you create a grouped combatant from a single base actor.
MOBTOKENS.HelpPromptStepOne: Open the Actor Directory in the sidebar.
MOBTOKENS.HelpPromptStepTwo: Right-click a normal NPC or monster actor.
MOBTOKENS.HelpPromptStepThree: Choose Create Group to set the creature count and pooled HP.
MOBTOKENS.HelpGuideIntro: Grouped actors turn several identical creatures into one actor and one combatant.
MOBTOKENS.HelpGuideStepOne: Right-click a base actor in the Actor Directory and select Create Group.
MOBTOKENS.HelpGuideStepTwo: Enter the number of creatures and confirm the HP per creature value.
MOBTOKENS.HelpGuideStepThree: Place the new group actor's token on the scene and use it like a normal combatant.
MOBTOKENS.HelpGuideStepFour: As HP changes, the group actor updates its remaining creature count automatically.
MOBTOKENS.HelpGuideOutro: Only GMs can create group actors, and already-grouped actors do not show the Create Group action.
MOBTOKENS.Notifications.GroupsCreatedFro: Created {groups} group actors from {count} selected tokens.
MOBTOKENS.Notifications.PartyGroupSplit: Split party proxy into {count} member tokens.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.ActorNotFound: Could not find the selected actor.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.TokenNotFound: Could not find the selected token.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.NoActiveScene: No active scene is available for token replacement.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidTokenSelectionCo: Select at least 2 tokens of the same actor to create a group from the map.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.PartyGroupMembersMissin: Party proxy members are missing; unable to split.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.PartyGroupMembersPartia: Some party proxy members were missing and could not be restored ({count}).
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidCreatureCount: Creature count must be at least 1.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidCurrentHP: Current HP must be a number, or a signed adjustment like +9 or -9.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidHPPerCreature: HP per creature must be at least 1.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidSplitGroupCount: Number of resulting groups must be between 2 and the current surviving count.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidSplitCountsForma: Split counts must be whole numbers greater than 0.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidSplitCountsLengt: You must provide one count value per resulting group.
MOBTOKENS.Errors.InvalidSplitCountsTotal: Split counts must add up to {total}.
